name: Heather Carcia, LICSW
title: Clinical Social Work/Therapist
bio: Heather helps clients move from burnout and overwhelm to balance and connection through humor, compassion, and evidence-based care. Accepting new clients now.

name: Kate Allain, LICSW
title: Clinical Social Work/Therapist
bio: Kate supports clients through grief, trauma, and life transitions, helping them heal and grow with empathy and self-compassion. Currently full; join the waitlist.

name: Devon Lapierre, LMHC
title: Licensed Mental Health Counselor
bio: Devon brings a steady, grounded presence to help adults navigate anxiety, depression, trauma, life transitions, and OCD. Her collaborative approach focuses on real change, not just insight. Accepting new clients now.
